## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#76)

**Dependency:** #72
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Write chapter 16 — Armor & Shields as a focused reference chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **How Protection Works** — Damage reduction philosophy
2. **Armor Table** — All armor types with dice requirements, DR, properties
3. **Shields** — Active and passive defense
4. **Armor and Movement** — Encumbrance, stealth penalties
5. **Donning & Doffing** — Time to equip/unequip
6. **Armor Degradation** — (optional) armor damage rules
7. **Magic Armor** — How enchanted armor scales

### Tasks
- [ ] Write armor section with full table
- [ ] Write shield section
- [ ] Create armor quick-reference table
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: combat (ch13), dice types (ch08)
